case_title: IN RE: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO RESPONDENT PAUSON, MAXINE
